changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO risk_types (id, category_domain_id, name, description) VALUES (101, 101, 'Confidentiality', 'The ability to ensure that only authorized and approved users have access to the data') , (102, 101, 'Integrity', 'The ability to ensure that the data is unaltered and is consistent, accurate, and trustworthy over its entire life cycle') , (103, 101, 'Accessibility', 'The ability to ensure the data is available') , (104, 101, 'Actors', 'Cyber criminals, hacktivists, nation state offensive teams') , (105, 102, 'Reputational', 'Loss of trust') , (106, 102, 'Operational', 'Unexpected failure in your company''s day-to-day operations') , (107, 102, 'Legal', 'Lawsuits and legal fees') , (108, 102, 'Financial', 'Money flowing in and out of your business, and the possibility of a sudden financial loss') , (109, 103, 'CVEs', 'Common Vulnerability Exposures') , (110, 103, 'Incidents', 'An event that may indicate that an organization''s systems or data have been compromised or that measures put in place to protect them have failed') , (111, 103, 'Threats', 'A malicious attempt to damage or disrupt a computer network or system') , (112, 103, 'Assessments', 'An on-going process of discovering, correcting and preventing security problems') , (113, 101, 'Vendor', '3rd Party Risk') ;
ALTER SEQUENCE risk_types_id_seq RESTART WITH 114;
